features: Medium texture angled head multi-level bristles
Made from sturdy and travel-friendly Material
Keep your teeth free of germs and healthy
Help to whiten teeth and clean hard to reach areas

description: Beauty Formulas Active oral care wave action toothbrush help keep your teeth free of germs and healthy. The medium texture angled head with multi-level bristles, makes it perform in the best way to keep gums healthy and safe from bleeding. It has angled neck for extra reach, greater control and more precise cleaning. Made from sturdy and travel-friendly material. A comfortable non-slip rubber handle makes the brush easy to use.
